table_work.thesis: The split between spot and perps was a mechanical artifact of how Hyperliquid was wired. Infinex is closing that seam: one account, one balance truth, no transfer step. Spot trading arrives natively as part of that closing.
table_work.through_action: to retire the seam between spot and perps
table_work.obstacle: Reader assumes this is another 'integration' headline — venue added, feature list, mild novelty. They expect to scan and move on.
table_work.reader_prior: Spot and perps are separate accounts on Hyperliquid; moving between them is a known chore; Infinex previously routed spot through swaps rather than offering native order entry.
table_work.lining: Surface: native Hyperliquid spot is shipping inside Infinex on one unified account. Underneath: we took responsibility for the plumbing so you stop thinking about which account holds what.
table_work.not_the_point: Order-type enumeration, sub-account mechanics, readiness-gate internals, swidge routing details, HIP-4 prediction markets.

x.physical_score: Steady weight forward. A flat declarative that names the change without selling it. The sentence leans in but doesn't strike.
x.micro_objective: to make the reader register the position before they scan past
x.obstacle_local: the temptation to lead with novelty or order types
x.shadow_move: a small directness leak — the writer wants to be believed without raising volume

x.physical_score: Short, single-stroke release. Names the chore that's gone — 'no transfer step', 'one account' — in a clipped phrase after the sustained set-up.
x.micro_objective: to land the closure of the old seam as already-done
x.obstacle_local: must not read as triumph; the decision is taken, not celebrated

web.physical_score: One declarative line. Weighted, direct, no qualifier. The seam is gone; the line says so.
web.micro_objective: to set the position in one breath
web.obstacle_local: headline register that promises a tour

in-product.physical_score: Light, direct, low-pressure. A UI surface that names the new state without ornament.
in-product.micro_objective: to make the new affordance feel like it was always there
in-product.obstacle_local: the urge to label or celebrate the change inside the product

picks.text: Hyperliquid spot is coming to Infinex on one unified account. Spot and perps read from the same balance. The transfer step between them is gone. One click to switch.
Hyperliquid spot, native on Infinex. Unified account: one balance for spot and perps, no class transfer.
